user.title: Connect to AI Hub
user.description: You can leave the main SiliconFlow API key blank for now and add only the services you need later from the integration details page. [Register]({register_url}) | [Get API Key]({api_key_url})

data.api_key: SiliconFlow API Key (optional main key for conversation, AI tasks, translation, STT, etc.)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to AI Hub service

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured

init.title: Configure AI Hub
init.description: Set or update the main SiliconFlow API key here. You can still add and configure services separately from the integration details page. [Register]({register_url}) | [Get API Key]({api_key_url})

init.title: Configure Conversation Agent
init.description: Customize the behavior and parameters of the conversation agent. Enable recommended mode to use the best settings, or disable it to customize all parameters. After submitting, the configuration information will be switched.

data_description.llm_provider: Select protocol type for the custom LLM endpoint
data_description.max_history_messages: Number of history messages to keep

init.title: Configure AI Task
init.description: Customize AI task behavior and parameters. Enable recommended mode for best settings, or disable it to customize parameters.

data_description.image_model: Select or enter custom image generation model
data_description.image_url: Complete image generation API URL (default: SiliconFlow)
data_description.custom_api_key: Custom API key (leave empty to use main key)

init.title: Configure Edge TTS Voice
init.description: Customize Edge TTS text-to-speech parameters. Edge TTS is a free TTS service provided by Microsoft, supporting multiple voices and languages.

data_description.voice: Select Edge TTS voice, like Xiaoxiao, Yunxi, etc.
data_description.lang: Select voice language, like zh-CN for Chinese

init.title: Configure Silicon Flow ASR
init.description: Customize Silicon Flow ASR speech-to-text parameters. Silicon Flow provides high-quality ASR service supporting multiple models and languages.

data_description.model: Select ASR model: FunAudioLLM/SenseVoiceSmall (recommended) or TeleAI/TeleSpeechASR
data_description.custom_api_key: Custom API key (leave empty to use main key)

init.title: Configure Integration Translation
init.description: Configure localization function. Use your selected AI endpoint to automatically translate English files to Chinese.

data_description.chat_model: Select or enter custom model name
data_description.custom_api_key: Custom API key (leave empty to use main key)
data_description.list_components: Only list available components without translating
data_description.force_translation: Translate even if a Chinese translation already exists

init.title: Configure Blueprint Translation
init.description: Configure blueprint translation function. Use SiliconFlow AI to automatically translate English blueprint files to Chinese.

data_description.custom_components_path: Custom integration directory path, default is custom_components

abort.blueprint_translation_no_reconfigure: Blueprint translation does not support reconfiguration. To modify settings, please delete and re-add.

generate_image.name: Generate Image
generate_image.description: Generate image using AI Hub SiliconFlow model

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.description: Describe the image content to generate

analyze_image.name: Analyze Image
analyze_image.description: Analyze image content using AI Hub

image_file.name: Image File
image_file.description: Path to the image file to analyze

message.name: Analysis Prompt
message.description: Tell AI how to analyze this image

tts_say.name: Edge TTS Speech Synthesis
tts_say.description: Convert text to speech using Edge TTS

text.name: Text
text.description: Text content to convert to speech

voice.name: Voice
voice.description: Select Edge TTS voice, like zh-CN-XiaoxiaoNeural

media_player_entity.name: Media Player
media_player_entity.description: Media player entity to play speech

stt_transcribe.name: Silicon Flow ASR Transcription
stt_transcribe.description: Convert speech to text using Silicon Flow ASR

audio_file.name: Audio File
audio_file.description: Path to audio file to transcribe (supports mp3, wav, flac formats)

model.name: ASR Model
model.description: Speech recognition model to use: FunAudioLLM/SenseVoiceSmall (recommended) or TeleAI/TeleSpeechASR

translate_components.name: Integration Translation
translate_components.description: Automatically translate Home Assistant integration English to Chinese

custom_components_path.name: Path
custom_components_path.description: Custom integration directory path, default is custom_components

service_entry_not_found.message: AI Hub config entry not found: {entry_id}

service_subentry_missing.message: The selected config entry does not include a {subentry_type} subentry

service_no_available_config.message: No available AI Hub configuration found

service_multiple_configs.message: Multiple AI Hub configurations detected. Please specify config_entry_id in the service call

service_api_key_not_configured.message: API key is not configured. Please set it in the integration configuration first

path_is_directory.message: The provided path is a directory: {path}

image_camera_unavailable.message: Unable to get image from camera: {entity_id}

image_source_required.message: Either image_file or image_entity must be provided

image_response_missing_payload.message: No image URL or base64 data in response

tts_edge_tts_not_installed.message: The edge_tts library is not installed. Please install it first: pip install edge-tts

stt_audio_file_required.message: Audio file path cannot be empty

stt_audio_too_large_runtime.message: Audio file too large. Please use a file smaller than 10MB.

stt_file_too_large.message: Audio file is too large. Maximum supported size is {max_size_mb}MB

stt_network_request_failed_runtime.message: Speech recognition network request failed. Please try again.

stt_service_busy.message: Speech recognition service is temporarily busy. Please try again.

stt_service_cannot_connect.message: Cannot connect to speech recognition service. Please check network.

stt_service_timeout.message: Speech recognition timeout. Please try again.

stt_failed_after_retries.message: Speech recognition failed after multiple retries.

stt_cannot_connect_after_retries.message: Cannot connect to Silicon Flow server after retries. Please check network.

stt_cannot_connect.message: Cannot connect to Silicon Flow server. Please check network.

stt_response_missing_text.message: API response format error. Cannot find transcription text.
